text.title: Post-Launch 72h Watch Runbook Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `post-launch-72h-watch-runbook`. Validator rejects with explicit violation list.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: on-call schedule with gaps inside the 72h window
